title: emerus sesban var. aculeata
intro: Emerus sesban var. aculeata, also known as the 'thorny sesban', is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Emerus sesban var. aculeata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are traditionally made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or applying them topically to affected areas.
